file_insights.purpose: Implements async auto_improve() function for Karpathy AutoResearch-inspired iterative improvement loop

key_functions.name: auto_improve
key_functions.signature: async def auto_improve(provider: LLMProvider, preset: Preset, max_iterations: int = 5, target_score: float = 0.8, plateau_limit: int = 3) -> list[GenerationRecord]
key_functions.responsibility: Orchestrates iterative song generation, evaluation, and improvement with early stopping mechanisms

patterns_discovered.name: Async Iterative Improvement Loop
patterns_discovered.description: Generator → Evaluator → Feedback cycle with score tracking across iterations
patterns_discovered.implementation: for i in range(max_iterations) with async/await for generate_song() and evaluate_song()

patterns_discovered.name: Multi-condition Early Stopping
patterns_discovered.description: Triple exit strategy: max iterations, target score convergence, or plateau detection

patterns_discovered.name: Score and Iteration Tracking
patterns_discovered.description: Best score and corresponding iteration number maintained across loop

patterns_discovered.name: Lineage Tracking
patterns_discovered.description: parent_iteration field preserves genealogy of each generated song
patterns_discovered.usage: record.parent_iteration = i if i > 0 else None

patterns_discovered.name: History Persistence
patterns_discovered.description: Entire run history saved after completion via save_history()

gotchas_discovered.issue: Parent iteration semantics may be confusing
gotchas_discovered.detail: parent_iteration=i when i>0 means iteration 2 points to iteration 1 (0-indexed loop counter), which works but could be semantically clearer with explicit i+1
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential confusion when interpreting lineage chains

gotchas_discovered.detail: Logger check 'best_score if best_score > 0 else evaluation.score' masks case where best_score legitimately equals 0.0
gotchas_discovered.impact: Misleading log output if actual best score is 0

gotchas_discovered.issue: No error handling for generation/evaluation failures
gotchas_discovered.detail: async calls to generate_song() and evaluate_song() have no try/except blocks
gotchas_discovered.impact: Single failure terminates entire loop without graceful degradation

gotchas_discovered.detail: prior_feedback passed to generate_song() could be None on first iteration, which may not be intended feedback behavior
gotchas_discovered.impact: First iteration doesn't benefit from feedback loop design

requirements_met: All parameters implemented: provider, preset, max_iterations, target_score, plateau_limit
Comprehensive logging at key decision points

recommendations.suggestion: Add try/except blocks around generate_song() and evaluate_song() calls with fallback strategies or retry logic
recommendations.rationale: Prevents cascade failures and improves robustness of iterative loop

recommendations.suggestion: Use explicit (i+1) for parent_iteration to match 1-indexed iteration numbers
recommendations.rationale: Simplifies lineage tracking interpretation and debugging

recommendations.suggestion: Replace 'best_score if best_score > 0' with a flag variable tracking if any score was recorded
recommendations.rationale: Handles edge case where best_score legitimately equals 0

recommendations.suggestion: Add INFO log when plateau detected, showing no_improvement_count threshold crossed
recommendations.rationale: Currently only logs WARNING; adding INFO entry helps trace early stopping logic

recommendations.suggestion: Add Optional[EvaluationResult] type hint for prior_feedback parameter in generate_song()
